emails.subject: RE: FW: Northern Border Partners Common Units
emails.body: RE: FW: Northern Border Partners Common Units The issue is that in order to sell the units there is a public disclosure of the units being in rawhide which may have some more issues. A 13d filing is required. If we want to sell then we need to file and wait. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: FW: Northern Border Partners Common Units
emails.body: The 10Q describes Rawhide although it does not list investments, it does reference domestic and international assets. I assume we can use the same disclosure as is shown in the Q. When you get back, we can talk more about it. Any time constraint on this (other than the obvious need for cash)? I hope Jerry hasn't mandated anyone just yet (especially Citi/Solly). To: Howard, Kevin A.; Mckean, George

emails.subject: RE: FW: Northern Border Partners Common Units
emails.body: This would be an Enron deal. And we just have to get over the hurdles here. To: Hayslett, Rod

emails.subject: RE: FW: Northern Border Partners Common Units
emails.body: Before we can sell the units need to be registered.

emails.subject: RE: FW: Northern Border Partners Common Units
emails.body: Dan boyle mentioned that today is the deadline for the Rawhide amendment. If we don't get it, could be trouble. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>
